HGSS.665.0001:
Cool! That’s the first time I’ve lost in
a while!\f
Hey, give me your phone number.\f
You’d be fun to battle, so I’ll call
you when I get stronger! [0200,0000]
HGSS.665.0004:
Hey, give me your phone number.\f
You’d be fun to battle, so I’ll call
you when I get stronger! [0200,0000]
HGSS.665.0005:
Man! You’re as tough as ever!\f
I’ve battled you over and over, but
[0103,0000,0000], I haven’t won once.\f
I bought tons of items to toughen up my
Pokémon, but to no avail...\f
Items alone aren’t the answer.
That must be what it is...\f
Here, take this, [0103,0000,0000].
I won’t be needing it anymore...\f
HGSS.665.0006:
Wow, when you call from inside the
Lighthouse, your voice just kind of\r
echoes. It’s kind of cool!
HGSS.665.0007:
How are your Pokémon doing?
My Pokémon are a bit too energetic.\f
[0100,000A,0000], especially.\f
Every time it spots a Trainer, it just
charges ahead into battle!\f
It gets to be a bit much for me!
Later!
HGSS.665.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s looking tougher
than ever.\f
It looks even tougher than me!
Later!
HGSS.665.0009:
Hey, I challenge you to a battle!
It won’t be like last time!\f
[0104,0003,0000]’s where I’m waiting
for you. Hustle over here pronto!
HGSS.665.0010:
Hey, you’d better not have forgotten
about our battle!\f
[0104,0003,0000]!
Hustle over quick! I’m waiting!
HGSS.665.0011:
We have to battle again sometime.
You can bet I’m going to keep\r
challenging you till I win.
